name: 迷途亡靈巡步
mnemonic: B1 Spectral Knight 幻靈騎士：聖光斬 + 召喚 add。
B2 Spectral Mage 幻靈法師：魔法 + 點名圓。
B3 Spectral King 幻靈王：終戰 boss 多階段。
notes: DT 7.1 DT 7.1 副本亡靈巡步（Lv 100）。Boss 依序為 Spectral Knight 幻靈騎士、Spectral Mage 幻靈法師、Spectral King 幻靈王。重點：依各 boss 機制走位、add 速秒、tankbuster 與 raidwide 配合減傷與團補。

mechanics.description: Party-wide magical damage and spawns a dangerous AoE at the edge of the arena.；全屏範圍 AoE 攻擊，全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: Malicious Mist 惡意之霧

mechanics.description: Spawns a floating head above each player's location. After a few seconds, the head will drop from its spawn location (in a small late telegraphed circ；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Falling Nightmare 墜落噩夢

mechanics.description: Summons several dolls around the arena.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Team Spirit 招式

mechanics.description: The dolls will begin running through the arena, aiming at certain players. Once each doll reaches the other side, it will run through the arena a seco；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Spirited Charge 衝鋒

mechanics.description: Four exaflare AoE telegraphs will spawn in the middle, 90 degrees away from each other. This is followed by another set of exaflares in the previously；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Evil Scheme 邪惡計畫

bosses.name: 幻靈騎士
mnemonic: Spectral Knight 幻靈騎士 機制：聖光斬 + 召喚 add。

mechanics.description: Spawns four teacups at the edges of the arena on the cardinals.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Troubling Teacups 麻煩茶杯

mechanics.description: A ghost appears, tethers, and possesses one teacup.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Tea Awhirl 茶旋

mechanics.description: Spawns 13 teacups, nine on the cardinals/center and four on the intercardinals.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Toiling Teapots 勞動茶壺

mechanics.description: is repeated again and functions similarly to its second incarnation. However, the ghosts will now tether two teacups on opposite cardinals.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Troubling Teacups / Tea Awhirl 麻煩茶杯

mechanics.description: Party-wide magical damage.；全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: Sordid Steam 齷齪蒸氣

bosses.name: 幻靈法師
mnemonic: Spectral Mage 幻靈法師 機制：魔法 + 點名圓。

mechanics.description: A large blue portal will spawn at the north, indicating a line AoE leaving the sides safe. This attack repeats, summoning two portals at the sides (wi；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Bitter Regret 招式

mechanics.description: The boss possesses debris and drops them on the arena (as telegraphed line AoEs), partitioning it into four quadrants.；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Poltergeist 幻動

mechanics.description: Träumerei prepares a ward against spirits! Each player will be given a large spread AoE marker. If they are hit by this with guise icon.p；隨機點名玩家圓形 AoE，被點立即拉開分散站位 5m+。
mechanics.name: Ghostduster 驅鬼

mechanics.description: Party-wide magical damage that also inflicts bleed bleeding.；全屏範圍 AoE 攻擊，全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: Malicious Mist 惡意之霧

mechanics.description: Spawns multiple Stray Phantagenitrix at the north wall in two alternating groups. The first group will being floating up and charging a line AoE attac；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Memorial March 招式

mechanics.description: Träumerei prepares a ward against the living! An attack that will instantly kill anyone without guise icon.png Ghostly Guise. Players mus；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Fleshbuster 肉體爆擊

mechanics.description: Line stack AoE marker on one player, dealing magical damage.；隨機點名玩家集合分攤 AoE，全員集合分攤傷害。
mechanics.name: Ghostcrusher 招式

bosses.name: 幻靈王
mnemonic: Spectral King 幻靈王 機制：終戰 boss 多階段。
